architecture_summary: Add a schema-backed, dry-run-only ChaosRehearsalExecutionReport that records scenario refs, invariant refs, injection-point refs, expected containment refs, expected signal refs, required evidence refs, rollback guard refs, result-bank digest refs, safety guards, receipt refs, and authority-denial flags before any runtime resilience or invariant-fuzz claim can affect staging, production, or canonical runtime state.
data_model_changes: Introduce ChaosRehearsalExecutionReport with rehearsal_scope, execution_mode, scenario_plan, execution_results, authority_boundary, safety_guards, receipt_refs, contract_summary, and evidence_refs
Represent scenario plans and result banks through digest refs instead of raw runtime logs or raw result payloads

Bind explicit no-live-chaos, no-production-target, no-staging-target, no-runtime-disruption, no-fault-injection, no-service-restart, no-data-corruption, no-event-chain-mutation, no-connector, no-secret, no-write, no-rollback-execution, and no-terminal-closure flags
rollback_plan: Revert the added schema, example, validator, tests, docs, manifest entry, proof matrix entry, generated fixture updates, and CI hook; rerun protocol, proof coverage, SDLC, and workspace governance checks.
migration_plan: No runtime migration. This is an additive public contract and Foundation Mode example.
